svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="5"> <diagram id="diag_ja_biztown_3.0_—_qr-based_paym" name="JA BizTown 3.0 — QR-Based Payment Transaction Flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1106" dy="762" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="872" height="432" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_stu" value="Student Tablet" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="16" width="840" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_qrshow" value="Display QR Token
(Color-coded Balance)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_stu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_mode" value="Auto Shopping Mode
(Window Opens)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_stu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="382" y="32" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_local_bal" value="Check Local Balance
(IndexedDB)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_stu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="638" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_vol" value="Volunteer Tablet (Unified POS)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="16" y="150" width="840" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_scan" value="Scan Student QR
(Camera API)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_vol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_amount" value="Enter Sale Amount
+ Product SKU" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_vol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="283" y="35" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_submit" value="Submit Transaction
(POST /payment)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_vol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="572" y="31" width="185" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sl_api" value="Azure Backend — Payment Microservice" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="3" y="300" width="869" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_apim3" value="Azure API Management
(Auth + Rate Limit)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.api_management;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_api" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="43" y="56" width="130" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_svc" value="Payment Microservice
(AKS Pod)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.aks;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_api" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="266" y="56" width="120" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_db" value="Azure SQL
(Debit Buyer / Credit Seller)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.sql_database;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_api" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="481" y="38" width="151" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n_sig3" value="Azure SignalR
(Push Balance Update)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure2.signalr_service;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" parent="sl_api" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="726" y="41" width="142" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="Activate QR" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_mode" target="n_qrshow" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="384" y="63" /> <mxPoint x="352" y="63" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="Verify Balance" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_qrshow" target="n_local_bal" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="252" y="63" /> <mxPoint x="252" y="110" /> <mxPoint x="640" y="110" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="QR Captured" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_scan" target="n_amount" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="Confirm Sale" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_amount" target="n_submit" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="Balance OK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_local_bal" target="n_submit" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" value="HTTPS POST
/payment" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_submit" target="n_apim3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="597" y="236" /> <mxPoint x="597" y="260" /> <mxPoint x="112" y="260" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" value="Validated
Request" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_apim3" target="n_svc" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" value="Atomic Debit/Credit
Transaction" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_svc" target="n_db" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" value="Confirmed Balance" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_db" target="n_sig3" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" value="Push Updated
Balance (Real-Time)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeColor=#0078D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=9;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3" source="n_sig3" target="n_qrshow" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="697" y="375" /> <mxPoint x="661" y="375" /> <mxPoint x="661" y="415" /> <mxPoint x="242" y="415" /> <mxPoint x="242" y="30" /> <mxPoint x="18" y="30" /> <mxPoint x="18" y="63" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-2" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-3"> <mxGeometry y="300" width="872" height="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_api" value="" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;fillColor=none;align=left;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="-0.9850746268656716" width="872" height="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb_api_box" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;fillColor=none;" parent="r7h0IReIMSP3C0e8ASSQ-2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry y="30" width="872" height="101.01" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
